entities:
FastAPI | PRODUCT | A modern high-performance web framework for building APIs with Python
Starlette | PRODUCT | A lightweight ASGI framework and toolkit that FastAPI is built on
Pydantic | PRODUCT | A data validation library that FastAPI uses for request and response schemas
Depends | CONCEPT | FastAPI function used to declare and inject dependencies into path operations
Tom Christie | PERSON | Developer who created the Starlette framework
Samuel Colvin | PERSON | Creator and maintainer of the Pydantic library
Dependency Injection | CONCEPT | Design pattern where a framework provides required dependencies to components
ASGI | CONCEPT | Asynchronous Server Gateway Interface specification for Python async web frameworks
relations:
FastAPI | built_on | Starlette | FastAPI is built on top of Starlette and inherits its core request/response primitives | 9
FastAPI | uses | Pydantic | FastAPI relies on Pydantic for automatic data validation and serialization | 9
Starlette | created_by | Tom Christie | Starlette was developed and is maintained by Tom Christie | 8
Pydantic | created_by | Samuel Colvin | Pydantic was created by Samuel Colvin as an independent open-source library | 8
Depends | part_of | FastAPI | Depends is the FastAPI function for declaring dependency injection relationships | 7
FastAPI | implements | Dependency Injection | FastAPI provides a built-in dependency injection system via the Depends function | 8
FastAPI | supports | ASGI | FastAPI is an ASGI framework that requires an ASGI server like Uvicorn to run | 7
